rationale: Phase 08 satisfies the approved plan: schema changes are additive, cache_invalidations now carry fanout state, push subscriptions are endpoint-hashed and encrypted, public cache state exposes a signed cursor and projection floor, SSE and push fanout are kill-switch guarded, public JSON responses carry projection/cache metadata, listing detail uses short static cache headers plus client metadata handoff, and the service worker evicts unit-keyed cached entries and rejects cached responses below the server floor. Public invalidation payloads expose only opaque unit cache keys and coarse reason classes.
residual_risks: No broad Jest run was executed.
No dedicated Playwright mobile hide-SLA script was added or run in this attempt.
